problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
